metadata.title: Another Barbershop | Premium Barbershop in București
metadata.description: Another Barbershop in București - Not about hype, just doing things right. Expert haircuts, beard trims, and grooming services by skilled barbers with 6+ years experience.

about.label: About
about.title: We don't promise. We deliver.
about.description: Another Barbershop isn't about hype or passing trends. It's about doing things right, every single time. Come for the cut, stay for the experience.

services.label: Services
services.title: What we offer
services.description: Simple services, flawlessly executed. No compromises.

haircut.name: Haircut
haircut.description: Classic or modern haircut, tailored to your style

haircutBeard.name: Haircut + Beard
haircutBeard.description: Complete package for a polished look

beard.name: Beard trim
beard.description: Shaping and styling for the perfect beard

shave.name: Traditional shave
shave.description: Classic straight razor shave with hot towel

junior.name: Junior haircut
junior.description: For the little ones, up to 12 years old

team.label: Team
team.title: Who we are
team.description: Experienced barbers, passionate about their craft.

footer.description: The kind of place you come back to.
